---
description: FOUNDER — onboarding for indie developers and professional teams.
---

You are coordinating **/FOUNDER**.

This command is the human-first entrypoint. It supports both solo indie builders
and professional teams. Language adapts to the mode selected.

## Subcommands

`idea | pro | status | help`

Default: `/FOUNDER` without subcommand → `/FOUNDER idea`

---

## Mode Detection

On first run, ask:

> "Are you building this solo or with a team?"
>
> **Solo / Indie** → conversational tone, plain language, opinionated defaults,
>                    minimal governance setup, faster onboarding
>
> **Team / Professional** → structured tone, formal governance, full agent
>                           assignment, parallel work streams

Save choice to `docs/memory/FOUNDER_MODE.md`.
This affects language complexity, governance doc generation, and swarm display.

---

## `/FOUNDER idea` — Guided Idea Workshop

Runs `/PLAN idea Mode C` (live interview + brainstorm). See `plan.md` for full spec.

**Additional behavior (FOUNDER context only):**

After PRD is locked:

1. Detect product type from PRD (SaaS / Website / Mobile / API)
2. Suggest 3 matching design profiles from `.cursor/design/*/design.md`:

```
Here are 3 design profiles that fit your project:

1. [profile-name]  — [one sentence plain-English rationale]
   Best for: [use case]

2. [profile-name]  — [one sentence plain-English rationale]
   Best for: [use case]

3. [profile-name]  — [one sentence plain-English rationale]
   Best for: [use case]

Which one? Type 1, 2, or 3.
```

3. Copy chosen profile to root `DESIGN.md`
4. Run `/START gates` silently → report results in plain language (Indie) or governance format (Pro)
5. Output closing card

**Closing card (Indie mode):**
```
✅ Your project is ready to plan.

What we'll build, in order:
1. Map your site/app pages and structure
2. Lock the design look, feel, and components
3. Generate your complete file structure
4. Build feature by feature, tested as we go

Type /PLAN all to run the full planning pipeline at once.
Type /GUIDE next for just one step at a time.
```

**Closing card (Pro mode):**
```
✅ NEZAM workspace initialized.

PRD:          docs/core/required/PRD.md
Design:       DESIGN.md (profile: [name])
Pipeline:     8 phases (Define → Research → Design → Content → Scaffold → Build → Harden → Ship)
Lead Agents:  ARCH-01, PM-01, design-lead, seo-specialist assigned
Gates:        [pass/fail count] — run /START gates for detail

Type /PLAN all to execute the full planning sequence.
```

---

## `/FOUNDER pro` — Professional Team Mode

For teams with technical PMs, CTOs, or professional developers.

Behavior:
1. Runs `/PLAN idea Mode C` (full interview + brainstorm)
2. Auto-generates on PRD lock:
   - `docs/core/required/PRD.md`
   - `docs/core/required/PROJECT_PROMPT.md`
   - `docs/03_architecture/ARCHITECTURE.md` (outline)
   - `docs/plans/gates/GITHUB_GATE_MATRIX.json` (stub)
   - `docs/core/VERSIONING.md`
   - `CHANGELOG.md`
3. Assigns lead agents to each domain with explicit swarm structure
4. Outputs swarm status card:

```
---
Swarm Status:     Initialized
Lead Agents:
  ARCH-01         → System architecture + data model
  PM-01           → Pipeline governance + hardlocks
  design-lead     → Design system + component contracts
  seo-specialist  → Research phase lead
Hardlocks:        PRD locked ✅ | Architecture pending ⚠️
Next Action:      /PLAN arch — define tech stack and data model
User Input Needed: Yes — review PRD.md and confirm it's accurate before proceeding
---
```

---

## `/FOUNDER status` — Plain-Language Health Check

Show each pipeline stage as: `Not started` / `In progress` / `Done`

If blocked:
- What is missing (one short sentence, no jargon)
- One command that fixes it

**Indie output style:** plain English, friendly
**Pro output style:** same content, governance table format

---

## `/FOUNDER help`

```
Usage: /FOUNDER <subcommand>

Subcommands:
  idea    → Idea workshop (free text / paste PRD / live interview)
  pro     → Professional mode with full governance setup
  status  → Plain-language project health check
  help    → This message

Examples:
  /FOUNDER idea
  /FOUNDER pro
  /FOUNDER status
```

---

## Output Style Rules

**Indie mode:**
- Friendly, plain language only
- Avoid: hardlock, subphase, SDD, artifact, SemVer, prompt artifact
- Technical details only in collapsible: `Technical detail (for developers)`

**Pro mode:**
- Structured, precise, governance-aware
- Internal terms allowed: hardlock, gate, subphase, artifact
- Swarm status footer on all substantive replies

## Recommendation Footer

Required on all substantive replies. Follow workspace-orchestration.mdc rules.
